title: monardella frutescens
intro: Monardella frutescens, also known as California bee plant, is a flowering plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Monardella frutescens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
